message.content: 看一下我所有对话目前用了多少次请求了

content.text: 我来帮你查看 Claude Code 的使用情况。

input.description: Check claude CLI help for usage/stats commands

content.content:
Usage: claude [options] [command] [prompt]

Claude Code - starts an interactive session by default, use -p/--print for
non-interactive output

Arguments:
  prompt                                            Your prompt

Options:
  --add-dir <directories...>                        Additional directories to allow tool access to
  --agent <agent>                                   Agent for the current session. Overrides the 'agent' setting.
  --agents <json>                                   JSON object defining custom agents (e.g. '{"reviewer": {"description": "Reviews code", "prompt": "You are a code reviewer"}}')
  --allow-dangerously-skip-permissions              Enable bypassing all permission checks as an option, without it being enabled by default. Recommended only for sandboxes with no internet access.
  --allowedTools, --allowed-tools <tools...>        Comma or space-separated list of tool names to allow (e.g. "Bash(git:*) Edit")
  --append-system-prompt <prompt>                   Append a system prompt to the default system prompt
  --betas <betas...>                                Beta headers to include in API requests (API key users only)
  --chrome                                          Enable Claude in Chrome integration
  -c, --continue                                    Continue the most recent conversation in the current directory
  --dangerously-skip-permissions                    Bypass all permission checks. Recommended only for sandboxes with no internet access.
  -d, --debug [filter]                              Enable debug mode with optional category filtering (e.g., "api,hooks" or "!1p,!file")
  --debug-file <path>                               Write debug logs to a specific file path (implicitly enables debug mode)
  --disable-slash-commands                          Disable all skills
  --disallowedTools, --disallowed-tools <tools...>  Comma or space-separated list of tool names to deny (e.g. "Bash(git:*) Edit")
  --effort <level>                                  Effort level for the current session (low, medium, high)
  --fallback-model <model>                          Enable automatic fallback to specified model when default model is overloaded (only works with --print)
  --file <specs...>                                 File resources to download at startup. Format: file_id:relative_path (e.g., --file file_abc:doc.txt file_def:img.png)
  --fork-session                                    When resuming, create a new session ID instead of reusing the original (use with --resume or --continue)
  --from-pr [value]                                 Resume a session linked to a PR by PR number/URL, or open interactive picker with optional search term
  -h, --help                                        Display help for command
  --ide                                             Automatically connect to IDE on startup if exactly one valid IDE is available

  --chrome                                          Enable Claude in Chrome integration

  --disable-slash-commands                          Disable all skills

  --fallback-model <model>                          Enable automatic fallback to specified model when default model is overloaded (only works with --print)

Usage: claude [options] [command] [prompt]
  --betas <betas...>                                Beta headers to include in API requests (API key users only)
  setup-token                                       Set up a long-lived authentication token (requires Claude subscription)

input.command:
# Count API requests across all conversation sessions by counting assistant messages
echo "=== 所有对话会话 ==="
echo ""

# Project: -home-yingbohao
echo "--- 项目: /home/yingbohao ---"
for f in ~/.claude/projects/-home-yingbohao/*.jsonl; do
    session_id=$(basename "$f" .jsonl)
    # Count assistant turns (API requests)
    assistant_count=$(grep -c '"role":"assistant"' "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    # Count user turns  
    user_count=$(grep -c '"role":"user"' "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    # Get total lines
    total_lines=$(wc -l < "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    # Get first and last timestamps
    first_ts=$(head -1 "$f" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.readline()); print(d.get('timestamp','N/A'))" 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A")
    last_ts=$(tail -1 "$f" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.readline()); print(d.get('timestamp','N/A'))" 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A")
    echo "  会话: $session_id"
    echo "    用户消息: $user_count, 助手回复: $assistant_count, 总行数: $total_lines"
    echo "    开始: $first_ts"
    echo "    结束: $last_ts"
    echo ""
done

echo ""
echo "--- 项目: /home/yingbohao/llm-train ---"
for f in ~/.claude/projects/-home-yingbohao-llm-train/*.jsonl; do
    session_id=$(basename "$f" .jsonl)
    assistant_count=$(grep -c '"role":"assistant"' "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    user_count=$(grep -c '"role":"user"' "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    total_lines=$(wc -l < "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    first_ts=$(head -1 "$f" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.readline()); print(d.get('timestamp','N/A'))" 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A")
    last_ts=$(tail -1 "$f" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.readline()); print(d.get('timestamp','N/A'))" 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A")
    echo "  会话: $session_id"
    echo "    用户消息: $user_count, 助手回复: $assistant_count, 总行数: $total_lines"
    echo "    开始: $first_ts"
    echo "    结束: $last_ts"
    echo ""
done
input.description: Count API requests across all conversation sessions

input.command:
# Also count subagent requests
echo "=== 子 Agent 请求统计 ==="
total_subagent=0
for f in $(find ~/.claude/projects/ -path "*/subagents/*.jsonl" 2>/dev/null); do
    count=$(grep -c '"role":"assistant"' "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    total_subagent=$((total_subagent + count))
done
echo "子 Agent 总助手回复数: $total_subagent"

echo ""
echo "=== 全局 history.jsonl 统计 ==="
if [ -f ~/.claude/history.jsonl ]; then
    assistant_count=$(grep -c '"role":"assistant"' ~/.claude/history.jsonl 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    user_count=$(grep -c '"role":"user"' ~/.claude/history.jsonl 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    echo "用户消息: $user_count, 助手回复: $assistant_count"
fi

echo ""
echo "=== 汇总 ==="
total_assistant=0
total_user=0
for f in $(find ~/.claude/projects/ -name "*.jsonl" ! -path "*/subagents/*" 2>/dev/null); do
    a=$(grep -c '"role":"assistant"' "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    u=$(grep -c '"role":"user"' "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    total_assistant=$((total_assistant + a))
    total_user=$((total_user + u))
done
echo "所有主会话 - 用户消息总计: $total_user"
echo "所有主会话 - 助手回复总计: $total_assistant"
echo "所有子Agent - 助手回复总计: $total_subagent"
echo "全部 API 请求总计 (主会话+子Agent): $((total_assistant + total_subagent))"
input.description: Count subagent requests and compute totals
